JUDGE ROBERT DONDERO, CLERK: DIANNE BOFFI/VERA MU, REPORTER: JO ANN BRYCE. ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON MAY-18-2004 IN DEPT. 206, PLAINTIFF JOANNA CHAPPELL'S MOTION TO SPECIALLY SET A TRIAL DATE IS GRANTED. TRIAL PREFERENCE IS GRANTED PURSUANT TO CCP 36(D). THE STATUS CONFERENCE OF 2/16/05 IS VACATED. THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 8/30/04, SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR 8/20/04 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 304. PATHOLOGY BY 5/28/04. RADIOLOGY BY 6/4/04. TRIAL DATE DEPENDANT ON GOOD FAITH IN DISCOVERY. WRITTEN ORDER PENDING.
